ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the region is located */,
  "economic_block" TEXT /* Economic block the region belongs to (e.g., EU, ASEAN) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the country is located */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the country */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* National currency */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "gdp_nominal" REAL /* Nominal GDP */,
  "gdp_ppp" REAL /* GDP (PPP) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fiscal_anchors" (
  "fiscal_anchor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fiscal anchor */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country using the fiscal anchor */,
  "fiscal_anchor_type" TEXT /* Type of fiscal anchor (e.g., Net domestic borrowing limit, Debt target) */,
  "fiscal_anchor_value" TEXT /* Value of the fiscal anchor (e.g., 3 percent of GDP, 50 percent) */,
  "fiscal_anchor_description" TEXT /* Description of the fiscal anchor */,
  "implementation_year" INTEGER /* Year the fiscal anchor was implemented */,
  "modified_year" INTEGER /* Year the fiscal anchor was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fiscal_anchor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fiscal_anchors_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country the comment pertains to */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the fiscal policy */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statutory_bases" (
  "statutory_base_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statutory base */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country using the statutory base */,
  "statutory_base_type" TEXT /* Type of statutory base (e.g., Statutory, Political commitment) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the statutory base */,
  "legal_framework" TEXT /* Legal framework that supports the statutory base */,
  "enforcement_mechanism" TEXT /* Mechanism for enforcing the statutory base */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statutory_base_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statutory_bases_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stability_funds" (
  "stability_fund_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stability fund */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country using the stability fund */,
  "fund_name" TEXT /* Name of the stability fund */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the stability fund */,
  "fund_size" REAL /* Size of the stability fund */,
  "management_entity" TEXT /* Entity responsible for managing the stability fund */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stability_fund_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stability_funds_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fiscal_policy_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "fiscal_anchor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fiscal anchor used */,
  "statutory_base_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the statutory base */,
  "stability_fund_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stability fund */,
  "debt_to_gdp_ratio" REAL /* Debt-to-GDP ratio */,
  "domestic_borrowing_limit" REAL /* Domestic borrowing limit (as a percentage of GDP) */,
  "short_term_debt_limit" REAL /* Short-term debt limit (as a percentage of GDP) */,
  "public_debt_to_gdp_ratio_target" REAL /* Public debt-to-GDP ratio target */,
  "domestic_primary_balance" REAL /* Domestic primary balance (as a percentage of GDP) */,
  "external_debt" REAL /* External debt */,
  "external_debt_to_gdp_ratio" REAL /* External debt-to-GDP ratio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fiscal_policy_history_fiscal_anchor_id FOREIGN KEY ("fiscal_anchor_id") REFERENCES fiscal_anchors ("fiscal_anchor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fiscal_policy_history_stability_fund_id FOREIGN KEY ("stability_fund_id") REFERENCES stability_funds ("stability_fund_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fiscal_policy_history_statutory_base_id FOREIGN KEY ("statutory_base_id") REFERENCES statutory_bases ("statutory_base_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fiscal_policy_history_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fiscal_policy_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the analysis */,
  "fiscal_anchor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fiscal anchor used */,
  "statutory_base_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the statutory base */,
  "stability_fund_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stability fund */,
  "analysis_text" TEXT /* Text of the analysis or insights */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Recommendations based on the analysis */,
  "conclusion" TEXT /* Conclusion of the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fiscal_policy_analysis_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fiscal_policy_analysis_fiscal_anchor_id FOREIGN KEY ("fiscal_anchor_id") REFERENCES fiscal_anchors ("fiscal_anchor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fiscal_policy_analysis_statutory_base_id FOREIGN KEY ("statutory_base_id") REFERENCES statutory_bases ("statutory_base_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fiscal_policy_analysis_stability_fund_id FOREIGN KEY ("stability_fund_id") REFERENCES stability_funds ("stability_fund_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_source_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table where the linked data is stored */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record in the linked table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_links_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the system (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table where the activity was performed */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record affected by the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
